overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars game showing a character walking through a sci-fi desert settlement at sunset. The character moves from an open canyon overlook into an industrial outpost with heavy machinery, neon-lit buildings, and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon overlook platform with panoramic view

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of a platform overlooking a vast canyon while observing the landscape

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon walls forming the edge of the platform
massive pink-hued planet or moon dominating the sunset sky
mountain range visible on the horizon beneath the planet
walkway with glowing blue accent lights along the edge
rocky overhang above the platform providing partial cover

segments.scene_description: The character stands on an open platform overlooking a vast desert canyon at sunset. A massive pink planet dominates the sky above distant mountains. The character walks along the platform edge, passing blue glowing lights embedded in the walkway.

events.description: character walks from open overlook into covered industrial plaza area beneath rock overhang

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial plaza toward the central structures

entered.detail: large cylindrical storage tanks with red piping
thick industrial pipes running along the ground
circular concrete plaza with geometric patterns
tall industrial building with glowing windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered industrial plaza beneath a massive rock overhang. Large storage tanks and pipes line the right side of the circular concrete platform. The central tower building becomes visible in the distance as the natural sky gives way to shadowed industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching central settlement building with neon lighting

events.description: lighting shifts from natural sunset to artificial industrial lighting as character moves deeper into the settlement

agents.ego_description: walking toward the central tower building, passing industrial machinery

notable_agents.action: two characters standing near a structure on the left side of the path

entered.detail: large industrial archway structure leading deeper into the settlement
stacked metal cargo containers and crates
heavy machinery and equipment with glowing elements

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the central tower building, which features glowing neon lights and industrial detailing. The environment transitions to artificial lighting as the character moves along a dirt path past machinery and cargo containers. An NPC pair stands near a structure on the left as the character heads toward a large archway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: settlement street with shops and commercial buildings

events.description: character passes through archway into a more enclosed street with commercial buildings
character passes by a shop with a glowing purple KYK sign on the left

agents.ego_description: navigating through the settlement street, passing various NPCs and shop fronts

notable_agents.action: group of characters standing and conversing near a structure
character walking in the opposite direction near the shop

entered.detail: building with glowing purple KYK signage and commercial front
open-front shop with various items on display
overhead industrial lighting fixtures illuminating the street

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the archway into a narrow settlement street lined with commercial buildings. A shop with a glowing purple KYK sign stands prominently on the left. The character encounters several NPCs, including a group conversing on the right and another character walking in the opposite direction. The street is lit by artificial overhead lights as the character continues deeper into the industrial settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, open desert overlook into the dense, neon-lit interior of an industrial settlement. It begins on an open platform beneath a massive pink planet and a sunset sky, moving along a walkway embedded with blue glowing lights. As the character advances, the natural horizon is replaced by a shadowed industrial plaza beneath a rock overhang, where the camera passes large storage tanks and pipes toward a distant central tower. The scene then shifts from natural light to artificial neon glows as the character navigates a dirt path past cargo containers and NPCs, eventually passing through a large archway. Finally, the environment narrows into a bustling settlement street lined with commercial buildings and purple signage, moving deeper into the artificial light of the outpost.
